headline: Study: Majority Of Americans Would Benefit From Decreased Phone Use During Sex

headline: New Geneva Convention Allows Use Of Child Soldiers With Signed Permission Slip
excerpt: GENEVA—In an effort to codify parental oversight for underage troops, a new Geneva Convention adopted Thursday reportedly allowed for the use of child soldiers with a signed permission slip from a legal guardian. “This landmark treaty expressly forbids minors from enlisting in combat roles unless sanctioned by their parent or guardian,” said International Committee of […] The post New Geneva Convention Allows Use Of Child Soldiers With Signed Permission Slip appeared first on The Onion .
